item.title: Why Bots Can't Vote Here: Four Layers of Defense Against the Dead Internet
item.description: Digg shut down because bots flooded free engagement. Liana Banyan built the economics differently — every action costs something real. Here are four structural layers that make manipulation economically irrational.

item.title: Why Join the Cooperative
item.description: Every truth anyone derives becomes yours, free, forever. The cooperative gets better, cheaper, and faster the more members there are — and it compounds. Plain-language value proposition.

item.title: Accounts Payable and Eligible Marks
item.description: Effort-differential currency backs real economic value.
